top_signals.title: TotalEnergies Extends French Fuel Price Caps Through June
top_signals.summary: TotalEnergies will keep its fuel price caps across all its services stations in France through June amid the ongoing crisis in the Middle East, the French supermajor said on Wednesday. TotalEnergies first announced in March caps on the price of gasoline and diesel it sells at its French stations as international crude oil prices soared after the Iran war began. Since then, the company has extended the price cap policy for April and May, and is now extending it through the end of June. TotalEnergies vows to pass on to customers any declines in international…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil falls as Iranian state television reports details of ceasefire proposal
top_signals.summary: Broadcast said draft deal would restore Strait of Hormuz shipping within a month
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Ellison Privately Vows to Limit Enlarged Paramount’s Debt
top_signals.summary: It began as a concession in private conversations to assuage wary credit analysts looking at Paramount Skydance Corp.’s blockbuster takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc.: a verbal pledge by the Ellison family to do whatever it takes to slash debt at the combined company.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Block kicks off Cash App’s phased stablecoin roll out to its nearly 60 million users
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Australia starts ‘high-risk’ life extension of its submarine fleet
top_signals.summary: The Australian National Audit Office (ANAO) has issued a damning verdict on Department of Defence planning for the life-extension program.
